titleStmt.title: SII 8.293: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 293. (A.R. No. 22-A of 1903). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
pirapava varuṣaM kārttikai 10 śrīmaṉmahāma
ṇṭaleśvara paṭṭuk kaṭṭāri Irāya vacavacaṅkaraṉ
maṟiĀti maṉṉarmaṇavāḷaṉ koṉeri tevamak
āIrācāviṉ kāriyattukkukkaṭavār vaṭakarai viru
tarācapayaṅkaravaḷanāṭṭu meṟkālnāṭṭu Iruṅ
koḷappāṭivaḷanāṭṭu karaippokkunāṭu tiṭ
ṭaikuṭi perumāḷ viṟṟirunta perumāḷkoyil tānattā
ṟku Āṟiya varakkāṭṭiṉa kāriyam Intaccirmai Āṇṭār
manavāttic cirmaiĀkat tiruuḷampaṟṟi Aruḷi putumutaluk
ku tikku caṉṉatiyile terippu Iṭukiṟa mukutattile Āṇṭa
var tirumeṉikku naṉṟāka veṇum Eṉṟu perumāḷ viṟṟiruntape
rumāḷ tiruviḷaiyāṭṭam karaippokkunāṭu viḷākam sarvamā
ṉṉiyamĀkap paṇṇukaiyil Inta Ūṟku puṟavari viṉiyoka
mākak koṇṭuvarukiṟa viṉiyokamum nalerutu naṟpacu
nalāṭu koṇikai virimuṭṭu Uluppai Ūḻiyam Uḷarmākā
ṇi civitam Atikāricoṭi karaṇikkarcoṭi Olaieḻuttuvanta
ṉai Aracupeṟu Āyam vaḻiccāri paṭṭaṭai calattaram maṟṟum E
ppeṟppaṭṭa pala viṉi yokaṅkaḷum cantiṟātittavaraiyum
sarvamāṉṉiyam Āka kaṟpitta Aḷavukku Immariyātiile
tirumaruṅ kile kalveṭṭi sarvamāṉṉiyamā
ka Aṉupovittukkoḷḷavum . Iṉta tarmmattukku hā
ṉi paṇṇiṉavarkaḷ keṅkaikaraiyil karāmpacuvai
konṟa pāpattile pokakaṭavarkaḷākavum Iṉta tarmma
ttai pālaṉai paṇṇinavarkaḷ keṅkaikaraiyile Ā
A few lines are lost at the end.
Digital edition of SII 8.293 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
